Kuroh is a quiet, serious and composed individual that appears tough and completely no-nonsense on the surface. He is very determined to accomplish his goals, whatever they may be, but despite so Kuroh is willing to set them aside for the finer things in life, such as genuine companionship. name: My Melody
description: She is a very honest, good-natured girl who wears a pink hood lovingly made by her grandma. Her favorite food is almond pound cake, though she loves to bake cookies with her mom. Along with baking, she is shown to love arts and crafts, and loves to make gifts for her friends. Although she is often pictured with Kuromi as friends, they are rivals.

name: Yumemi Yumemite
description: A second-year student in charge of PR for the student council. She also works as an idol, but there’s a huge gap between her facade and her true face. Yumemi has a two-faced personality. - On the outside, she is a sweet and lovely girl who loves her fans above all. - However, in reality, she's an arrogant, calculated and sadistic person, who will do everything to be on top. name: Maggie Mui
description: The middle Paper Sister, Maggie is claustrophilic and loves reading almost as much as her elder sister Michelle. She is tall, quiet and prefers male clothing. Therefore she's sort of intimidating at first, but in fact is quite shy and kind hearted. Her paper specialty is defense and summoning of various paper "elementals".

name: Reborn

name: Tamamo Cross
description: __Height:__ 140 cm A successful racer in the Twinkle Series with a Kansai accent. Despite her small stature, she is considered the strongest active racer. She has been aware of [Oguri Cap](https://anilist.co/character/96114/Oguri-Cap) since witnessing one of her races in Kasamatsu, due to both having gray hair. The two share a great rivalry with each other.

name: Vermilio
description: __Height:__ 152cm (5') __Power level:__ 78 One of the Four Heavenly Kings of the Empire. Has a hair-trigger temper, but is big-hearted underneath. The serious one of the group, she usually gets caught up in Helck and Piwi's shenanigans. She can use fire and summoning magic and excells at fighting several enemies simultaneously.

description: Nanako Yukishiro is a vibrant, cheerful high school girl. Nanako, however, carries one peculiar trait, instead of verbal communication, she pens senryu poems to express her thoughts and feelings. Nanako is outgoing, always wearing her heart on her sleeve.

He often puts on overdramatic acts but rarely breaks his composure internally. He has been shown to be somewhat ruthless and unfaltering when it comes to violence. He hasn't, however, shown any particular enjoyment from killing. His ruthlessness comes from his pragmaticism.
